meta.name: combat_encounter
meta.description: A structured prompt for creating dynamic and engaging D&D combat scenarios that integrate environmental factors, enemy tactics, and narrative consequences.

inputs.name: environment_setting
inputs.label: Primary Environment
inputs.description: The core geographical setting for the combat.

inputs.name: enemy_type
inputs.label: Primary Enemy Type
inputs.description: The main category of foes the party will face.

inputs.name: party_level
inputs.label: Party Level
inputs.description: The average character level of the player party, used to balance the encounter difficulty.

inputs.name: complexity
inputs.label: Encounter Complexity
inputs.description: Desired level of environmental and tactical complexity.

outputs.name: combat_encounter_plan
outputs.label: Combat Encounter Plan
outputs.description: A complete, structured plan for a D&D combat encounter.

fields.name: environment
fields.label: Environment
fields.description: Details about the geographical setting and its features.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Location Name
fields.description: The specific name of the encounter location.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: A vivid description of the environment for the players.

fields.name: key_features
fields.label: Key Features
fields.description: A list of significant physical features that impact combat.

fields.name: feature
fields.label: Feature
fields.description: The physical feature (e.g., Lava Pool, Icy Wall).

fields.name: impact
fields.label: Impact
fields.description: The mechanical and narrative impact of the feature on gameplay.

fields.name: enemy_forces
fields.label: Enemy Forces
fields.description: The types of enemies involved, their numbers, and their tactics.

fields.name: type
fields.label: Type
fields.description: The name and type of enemy (e.g., Mountain Troll).

fields.name: count
fields.label: Count
fields.description: The number of this enemy type in the encounter.

fields.name: tactics
fields.label: Tactics
fields.description: How these enemies exploit the environment and combat the party.

fields.name: encounter_mechanics
fields.label: Encounter Mechanics
fields.description: The setup, dynamic events, and interaction rules for the encounter.

fields.name: starting_positions
fields.label: Starting Positions
fields.description: Description of where enemies and features are placed at the start of combat.

fields.name: dynamic_events
fields.label: Dynamic Events
fields.description: Environmental changes or hazards that occur during combat.

fields.name: event
fields.label: Event
fields.description: The name of the event (e.g., Geyser Eruption).

fields.name: trigger
fields.label: Trigger
fields.description: The condition or timing that causes the event.

fields.name: effect
fields.label: Effect
fields.description: The full mechanical effect of the event, including damage and saves.

fields.name: resolution
fields.label: Resolution
fields.description: Potential outcomes, consequences, and narrative hooks following the encounter.

fields.name: encounter_outcomes
fields.label: Potential Outcomes
fields.description: Possible ways the encounter could conclude.

fields.name: consequences
fields.label: Consequences
fields.description: The immediate consequences of the most likely outcomes.

fields.name: follow_up_hooks
fields.label: Follow-up Hooks
fields.description: Ideas for how to transition this encounter into future adventures.
